Title: Deep learning for image classification using neural network architectures
Abstract: This paper applies deep learning and neural network models to image classification tasks with state of the art results.

Title: Neural network object detection with convolutional network layers
Abstract: A convolutional network approach to object detection using neural network architectures for real time processing.

Title: Transfer learning for semantic segmentation in medical imaging
Abstract: We apply transfer learning techniques to semantic segmentation of medical images using pretrained features.

Title: Deep learning image classification with a toy dataset evaluation
Abstract: This study evaluates deep learning for image classification but uses only a toy dataset for benchmarking.
Manual_Tags: deep learning; image classification; toy dataset

Title: Neural network for natural language processing tasks
Abstract: This paper proposes a neural network model for text summarization and sentiment analysis applications.

Title: Feature extraction visual inspection for quality control systems
Abstract: A feature extraction pipeline for visual inspection in manufacturing quality control processes.

Title: Deep learning face recognition with preliminary experiment results
Abstract: A preliminary experiment using deep learning for face recognition on surveillance camera footage.
Manual_Tags: deep learning; face recognition; preliminary experiment

Title: Optical microscopy techniques for material surface analysis
Abstract: This study examines optical microscopy methods to evaluate material surface roughness and defects.
